name: lizard-core
description: Deploy and manage your Lizard resources from Codex. Auto-installs the lizard CLI on first session.

interface.shortDescription: Deploy apps, services, and managed databases via Lizard.
interface.longDescription: Deploy and manage anything Lizard supports — projects, services, managed databases (postgres / redis / s3), domains, secrets — from inside Codex. Includes a SessionStart hook that auto-installs the lizard CLI (one-time, via curl or npm).
defaultPrompt: Add a managed Postgres database to my project.
Show logs for my Lizard service.
